overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and industrial architecture. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the player navigating through highways and city streets with moderate traffic.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an industrial district with large construction cranes and power lines against a dusky sky. The vehicle approaches a highway entrance, passing commercial buildings with neon accents, and comes to a stop at a red traffic light beneath the Highway 101 sign.

accelerating as traffic light turns green and proceeding onto highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light on the highway approach before accelerating onto an elevated overpass. The Arasaka tower dominates the skyline ahead while a large holographic billboard appears on the right, and the Highway 101 sign passes overhead.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major commercial intersection dominated by a massive holographic billboard displaying colorful advertisements. After waiting at the red light, the vehicle turns right, passing neon-lit storefronts while the Arasaka tower remains visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Driving past the massive holographic billboard, the vehicle enters a narrower industrial street lined with warehouses and construction cranes. The Arasaka tower looms larger in the center view as the vehicle passes beneath an overpass structure, transitioning into a more enclosed urban canyon.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a final intersection in the industrial district and stops at a red light. Pedestrians are visible walking on the sidewalks near buildings with red neon signage, while construction cranes are visible against the darkening sky in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a gritty industrial district into the neon-saturated heart of a futuristic commercial center. It begins by navigating past construction cranes and power lines under a dusky sky, moving toward a highway entrance where the vehicle pauses at a red light beneath a Highway 101 sign. As the light changes, the camera accelerates onto an elevated overpass, shifting the perspective to reveal the towering Arasaka skyscraper dominating the skyline alongside a massive holographic billboard. The scene then expands into a major commercial intersection filled with colorful advertisements before the vehicle turns right, gliding past a series of neon-lit storefronts with the distant tower still anchoring the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous drive from a wide, holographic-lit thoroughfare into the enclosed, neon-drenched depths of an industrial district. It begins by passing a massive holographic billboard, moving the vehicle into a narrower street lined with warehouses and towering construction cranes. As the camera passes beneath a heavy overpass structure, the environment shifts into a tight urban canyon with the Arasaka tower looming larger in the center view. The scene then opens toward a final intersection where the vehicle comes to a halt at a red light. Finally, the view settles on pedestrians walking past buildings adorned with red neon signage, while distant cranes stand silhouetted against the darkening sky.
